info.name: Decode a VIN into a full vehicle specification.

items.docs: Decodes a 17-character VIN and returns the full vehicle specification. Control sum = substr(sha1("{VIN}|decode|{apikey}|{secretkey}"),0,10).

info.name: List the vehicle details available for a VIN.

items.docs: Returns the list of vehicle details that can be decoded for the VIN (free of charge). Control sum = substr(sha1("{VIN}|vininfo|{apikey}|{secretkey}"),0,10).

info.name: Get statistical market value for a vehicle.

items.docs: Returns statistical price and odometer data for matching vehicles on the market. Control sum = substr(sha1("{VIN}|vehicle-market-value|{apikey}|{secretkey}"),0,10).

info.name: Check a VIN against stolen-vehicle databases.

items.docs: Real-time check against national police stolen-vehicle databases and Vincario's own database. Control sum = substr(sha1("{VIN}|stolencheck|{apikey}|{secretkey}"),0,10).
Returns remaining credits per service. Control sum = substr(sha1("{apikey}|balance|{apikey}|{secretkey}"),0,10).
